seoTitle: Sandstone Point vs Sandy Camp — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sandstone Point and Sandy Camp. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sandstone Point vs Sandy Camp: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sandstone Point and Sandy Camp.
heading: Sandstone Point vs Sandy Camp — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sandstone Point, Queensland and Sandy Camp, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sandy Camp has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Sandstone Point (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sandstone Point or Sandy Camp safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sandstone Point has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Sandy Camp scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sandstone Point scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Sandy Camp scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sandstone Point or Sandy Camp?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sandy Camp has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
